summary: Tested 4 regression fixes for film release: 1) Soundtrack/Composer evaluation in release - VERIFIED in backend (modifiers.soundtrack) and frontend (purple highlight in Phase 5), 2) Film release cinematic animation - VERIFIED 5-phase animation in FilmPopup.jsx with proper data-testid attributes, 3) Release feedback - VERIFIED immediate loading state and animated phases, 4) Produci filter - VERIFIED frontend filters out completed/released films
critical_code_review_comments: Backend release endpoint (lines 3204-3245) returns all required fields: quality_score, release_image, screenplay_scenes, critic_reviews (up to 3), audience_satisfaction, soundtrack_rating, release_event, modifiers.soundtrack
Frontend FilmPopup.jsx ReleaseStepContent (lines 1008-1410) has complete 5-phase cinematic animation with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend FilmPipeline.jsx (line 2883) correctly filters out completed/released films: .filter(p => !['completed', 'released'].includes(p.status))
Cinema images exist at /assets/release/cinema_flop.jpg, cinema_normal.jpg, cinema_success.jpg
Soundtrack displayed in Phase 5 with purple highlight (lines 1319-1327) when modifiers.soundtrack > 0

success_rate.backend: 100% (4 passed, 2 skipped - no films ready for release to test actual endpoint)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user has 2 films: 'Il Grande Mistero' (status=completed, already released with critic_reviews and audience_satisfaction) and 'Fuoco e Cenere' (status=proposed). To test the actual release endpoint with cinematic animation, need a film in 'shooting' status with shooting_completed=true. The release animation code is in FilmPopup.jsx lines 1008-1410.

frontend.Produci page filters out completed/relea: PASS - verified via Playwright (only 'Fuoco e Cenere' shown, 'Il Grande Mistero' hidden)
frontend.Release cinematic has 5 phases: VERIFIED in code - Phase 1 (intro), Phase 2 (trailer), Phase 3 (event), Phase 4 (numbers), Phase 5 (final)

regression_fixes_verified.issue_1_soundtrack_evaluation: FIXED - Backend returns soundtrack in modifiers, frontend displays with purple highlight in Phase 5
regression_fixes_verified.issue_2_cinematic_animation: FIXED - Full 5-phase animation ported to FilmPopup.jsx with proper transitions
regression_fixes_verified.issue_3_release_feedback: FIXED - Immediate loading state (setReleasePhase(0)) and animated phases with timeouts
regression_fixes_verified.issue_4_produci_filter: FIXED - Frontend filters out status='completed' and status='released' from film list
